reviews.title: Avoid this hotel, not worth your money
reviews.text: This hotel is barely a 2 star, not even close to a 4 star. Rooms and hallways are smelly, furniture is very old, the mattress of the bed seems to have been taken from the trash bin, WIFI internet is fantastically free but of course it does not work (signal ridiculously  even in the common areas of the hotel), food at the expensive restaurant is among the worst Italian (really, Italian?) I have ever been eaten, and to complete the nice picture they make you pay the shuttle to and from the hotel 6 euros each way, for a distance of about 3 kms from the airport. Avoid this hotel, it is unfortunate that a respectable company like Agoda is providing some incorrect information about this property.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Not much honestly.
reviews.negatives:
We booked this hotel specifically because they advertised a pool, only to find out we couldn't use it the entire time due to “daily cleanings” and “no lifeguard on duty.” Why even advertise a pool if guests can’t access it? Total bait-and-switch.

To make matters worse, most of the staff acted like we were an inconvenience just for asking basic questions. Unfriendly, unhelpful, and in some cases downright rude. The only bright spot was Gloria — the one staff member who seemed to care and treated us like actual human beings. Give her a raise and retrain the rest.

Between the false advertising, lack of amenities, and poor customer service, we won’t be back — and I’d recommend others stay far away unless you enjoy disappointment.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Hello

I had a reservation to the hotel for the 7/26/2022. That reservation made to use a room just for few hours.

We get to hotel at 23:30 with 3 suitcases and 2 hang bag, for to leave at 3:30. It mean to have shower, organize the suitcases, rest 1-2 hours, drink coffee, and leave.

After we booked there were a problem with one of the elevators, so the told us to use the second elevator. But the second was not able to work because the first that not work was faulty in the reception floor. To my explanation I get an answer to wait, which is meen until somebody would come with the elevator to that floor (it was 15 before midnight).

When we got to the room we open the suitcases and plan for shower. There was not even one towel at the room. So we wait until the brings towels.

When we get into the shower it was impossible to have shower because there were no cold water (only hot). We call again and we asked to wait. Then, the told us that the change the room to another floor(even with no chacking because the Absolutly knew about that problem when the gave the room).

We had to dress again to pack the whole things and to move to a new floor. If until now it not enough, also at the new room there was no towel. So I went back to the room before and brought the towels.

Do you think that the peace had come!!!!!!!!!

I discovered that there is not Tea/coffee maker so I went back to the previous room to bring Electric Kettle. 

Do you think that the peace had come!!!!!!!!!.

Even here there was only hot water, so we gave up the shower. we had left less then 2 hours to get a rest with no shower.

And now the last: before going to the airport we intended to make our coffee. what we discovered: surprised!!!! After I brought Electric Kettle, we have how to boiled water for coffee but there were no coffee and not glasses.

That is my Experiences   from that hotel. Not recommended.

reviews.title: STAY AWAY FROM THIS HOTEL
reviews.positives: Finally leaving the hotel.
reviews.negatives:
First, we didn't really check out the location, our bad.  The hotel is located in an almost industrial area near the airport.  On our first day the TV didn't come on and it took a long time before someone was able to get it going.  That night, when using the shower, water flowed out from the shower area and onto the bathroom floor. From there water flowed into the room and eventually out into the hallway. When we complained at reception and asked for a room change, they were only apologetic and would not honor our request. They also made sure that other guests didn't overhear our complaints. Later that evening, they called us to tell us that they had another room for us. We quickly moved to the new, which was a handicapped accessible room. We then found the safe in that room wouldn't lock. When we returned to our room after visiting Rome, we couldn't open the sliding doors to our closet. After about fifteen minutes, we finally got the doors open. When it came time to check out and take the shuttle to the airport, the reception clerk refused to give me a reservation to the shuttle although my wife and our luggage were already aboard the shuttle. I finally had to get the shuttle bus driver to straighten out things. 
I didn't mention breakfast which was mediocre the say the least. 
We were supposed to have bathrobes in our room, we asked four times for them and each time they said they would deliver them. We never got the bathrobes.
We never had such a bad experience in a like that before. Giving this hotel a one star is giving them a gift.

reviews.text: The shuttle bus departs from Airport Terminal 3, and I only received a copy of the information that should be on the hotel website when I inquired. Additionally, on the day of my stay, I was given a room that seemed to be better than what I had actually booked, which appeared to be meant for those leaving early in the morning. reviews.title: It's better not to trust the shuttle bus schedule from the airport; the breakfast was good.
reviews.text:
The shuttle bus from the airport to the hotel does not require a reservation, but it does not arrive on time. I intended to take the bus at 19:20 and waited from 19:00 at "Bus Stop 1 in front of Door 4" of Terminal 3, but the bus did not come at the scheduled time, and I ended up waiting for an hour until 20:00. The fare for the shuttle bus is 6 euros one way.

The hotel restaurant said that the "last order is at 21:30," so I went at 21:00, but in reality, I could still order even at 22:00. In Italy, time is often flexible, for better or worse.

For dinner, I ordered a Greek salad and a dish of octopus and potatoes, both of which were not delicious at all, and I left nearly everything.

The room is old but spacious, and the bathroom felt newly renovated. However, the handheld shower was designed more for looks and was difficult to use. This might be because I am used to Japanese showers.

The air conditioning in the room could not be individually adjusted; even when set to 30 degrees with the switch, it was very cold, and despite it being summer, I had to wear long-sleeved, long-pants pajamas and cover myself with two comforters to sleep. When I turned off the air conditioning, it became hot, making it difficult to find a comfortable adjustment.

Breakfast was not just the typical "only sweet things" often found in Italian hotels, but it had a wide variety and was much tastier than the previous evening's dinner.

The shuttle bus to the airport on the way back arrived on time.

Since it is a hotel close to the airport, I think many people use it for one night, and I can recommend it for a one-night stay.

reviews.title: Mercure Rome Airport
reviews.text:
Hotel was fine and conveniently located - with a paid shuttle bus to and from the Airport. I HIGHLY recommend taking the bus if you are jot in a hurry since the prevailing Uber/Taxi fare was around EUR40, while the bs cost EUR6 each way.

I caught the shuttle at T3, with the hotel bus stop being in the middle of the roadway, as is the case at many US Airport. Signage not great, but it's there!

Hotel has a bar and restaurant with a range of reasonably priced bar food still available at 10pm when I arrived.

My ONLY negative was the non-functioning air-conditioning. The room was at a reasonable temperature 20C, but coming from Texas I like my room cold... and this was not an option, as the hotel controlled the function, not the thermostat. It's annoying but typical in Europe. 

Otherwise, a well-priced, convenient hotel which I would recommend.

reviews.text:
My friend and I had to stay one night somewhere safe and convenient after an 11:55 PM flight landing and this hotel was perfect for our late night needs.

LOCATION
I wish this place was closer to The airport! The cab cost us 20 euro. But we were in a bond and had to cough up the fee. 

STAFF: 
The front desk people were kind, efficient, and knowledgable. They accomadated my friend and I even with our late check in and were all very helpful when we arrived. 
When we checked out, they were just as friendly and personable. 

ROOM
Our beds were comfy and the room was clean. Great to find after hours of plane travel! 

SHUTTLE 
The shuttle was a real help to get us into Rome's city center. My only wish is that we could have been dropped off closer to a metro line and that the AC was stronger. But other than that, it was great! Very convenient and clean. Decently priced as well. 



Overall, thank you for a great, safe and clean stay!!

reviews.title: Close proximity to FCO airport €6 transfer shuttle
reviews.text:
*Departing Rome hotel stay* 
After reading reviews of expensive taxi fares i decided to take public transport from rome city center termini station which was super easy. If you plan to stay at fco da vinci airport hotel before taking a flight the next day you can either take a €4 bus to fco airport or the train which i found easier €14 to fco which takes you to terminal 3 departures, then you just have to take the stairs downstairs to arrivals and follow the signs to hotel shuttle number 24. The shuttle is €6 which they record your name and charge to your hotel account. 
The hotel may have been a 4 star in its day but it would be a 3 star now entirely based on the condition of the hotel rooms and amenities for example: scratched chipped paint on walls, furniture and signage, stainless steel tap handle worn and rusted, smelly carpet on 3rd floor, broken gym equipment etc. The bar menu was reasonably priced for a hotel i suppose at €10 a salad (generous portion), €2.50 cappuccino, €7 wine, the dining restaurant is more expensive. Overall it was clean, safe and the staff were friendly, good for a quick stopover near the airport at an affordable cost.

reviews.title: Perfect location to be close to airport
reviews.text: The Leonardo da Vinci Rome Airport Hotel is close enough to the airport but at the same time only about 30mins away from the city.  As I needed a 2 day stopover I found this hotel to be the perfect choice.  The restaurant and bar was pretty good and the breakfast provided was a nice range of hot and cold selections.  The gym equipment was in good condition and easy to use.  The swimming pool was nice and big.  If you need to visit a local store for supplies.  I found a local grocery store only a 6 minute walk.  Just turn right out of the driveway and walk straight you will reach this store in about 6 minutes.  The shuttle bus service they provide for a small fee to then city was convenient as we were dropped off and pickup after we spent a day visiting the Colosseum.  If you are looking for a hotel for a short stay, Leonardo da Vinci Rome Airport Hotel is a nice choice.

The only downer for us was the rather surly reception staff. What is it about 4 and 5 star hotels that reception staff training seems to include officiousness rather than genuine attentive interest?

reviews.title: Une chambre qui manque d'amour et un service de navette qui manque d'explications
reviews.text: Dans le site web de l'hôtel ou dans les confirmations de réservations écrites, on n'explique jamais que l'hôtel a un service de navette, quel est son horaire et comment on peut en profiter. Truc: à l'aéroport, il suffit de se rendre à l'emplacement no 24 de l'aire réservée aux autobus et non pas aux endroits réservés aux "shuttle - navette". Pour l'horaire, appelez l'hôtel. Le trajet dure 15 minutes. Le prix: 6€ par personne par trajet donc 24€ pour un couple qui fait un aller-retour. Si vous n'aimez pas vous tracasser, aller plutôt au Hilton qui est sur le site de l'aéroport. La chambre manquait d'amour: le cadre du miroir est dépoli à outrance, la robinetterie est âgée et la pression d'eau est très faible lorsqu'on prend sa douche. Par contre, la chambre est grande et confortable, le buffet-déjeuner est excellent, l'hôtel est très propre et le prix est bon.

Vicino alla porta principale , difronte la reception accanto all accensore .im somma una camera che sembrava per lo staff e non per clienti . Sentivamo tutti quello che succedeva all reception tutti i check in che hanno fatto . Praticamente ho fatto il turno lavorativo con loro !!!!!!! Ed è vergognoso . La colazione è da un 2 stelle . Succhi e caffè sono fatti da macchinari . Per un espresso decente devi andare al bar e pagare !!! Insomma se tolgono qualche stella . Magari uno ha delle aspettative diverse !!!

reviews.title: The minute that Mercure gets their Wi-Fi fixed, I will be back and a loyal guest
reviews.positives: I have stayed at the property several times and I really like almost everything about it. Clean easy to access excellent staff great food and drink coverage options and they provide service to and from the airport for a reasonable cost.
reviews.negatives: The Wi-Fi is always very iffy. And for my last stay, it didn’t work at all and I missed two zoom meetings that I needed to participate in. And I couldn’t check in for my flight or select  a seat for a 12 hour flight. I spoke to the front desk and they said their Wi-Fi has not been working well for quite a while and there are only a few rooms that actually have good Wi-Fi. They said they have to  overhaul the complete system which takes time and is expensive. In today’s world and airport hotel needs to have working Wi-Fi, or at least alert their guests.

reviews.title: This hotel was less than par for the course.
reviews.positives: The property was located pretty closely to the airport which was convenient.
reviews.negatives:
We were initially greeted by a front desk agent who seemed like she couldn’t be bothered. She was not friendly nor did she really seem to care. She rushed us through check-in, which I’m not upset with, but her attitude could have been a little more polite. We were told the hotel had WiFi and were given the WiFi code upon check-in. We were placed in a room in the back corner of the hotel. We got to the room and noticed the WiFi did not work. We reset our phones and tried connecting to both “Mercure” and “Mercure Meeting” to no avail. I called the front desk from the room and spoke to the same lady who checked us in. She essentially told me to reset my phone and try logging into “Mercure Meeting” to which I told her I had tried but had no luck and she then proceeded to hang up on me.

We walked back down to the front desk where we were greeted by a different front desk agent (I believe her name was Sharon). She was very kind. I asked to be moved rooms and I needed to be close to the stairs and elevator. I also told her the WiFi did not work in the very rear of the hotel. We were shown a new room and moved. When we got to the new room, we noticed the WiFi still did not work. When we asked about it again, we were told there was nothing the staff could do to remedy the problem. We stayed in a room where it was advertised that there was WiFi but there was none. The WiFi only worked in the reception, bar, and restaurant area which is highly inconvenient when you’re traveling internationally. Later in the evening, upon using the bathroom in the room, I noticed the shower did not drain at all. We went to the front desk, again, and they sent a maintenance worker to the room to fix the shower drain. While the shower now drained, the room smelled like sewage and there were drain flies in the bathroom.

Our room was right near the front door of the hotel which is where everyone seemed to congregate and chain smoke and talk loudly all night which made for an unpleasant stay.

reviews.title: Save your money and go else where
reviews.negatives:
Worst hotel experience of my life. 
 I had expressed via booking chat it was our honeymoon and all I was give was 1 free drink coupon. It’s not like there was two people enjoying the honeymoon?? So why was I given one coupon.
While the room was nice and spacious there was no English speaking channels, and in the description it said they offered streaming service like “Netflix” and there was no such thing when we got to the room. The wifi was absolute GARBAGE which made it worse because I couldn’t watch Netflix on my phone. The flush button on the toilet was broken and it feel off every time. The mattress was awful.
When I went down to complain about the wifi, the front desk tried to move us to another room but, of course, they were fully booked.
The room itself was old, outdated, and disgusting. 
All the staff were very pleasant and friendly they forgot to give us our ticket for the shuttle bus and when the driver was collecting them he was mad AT THE CLIENT for not having it. 
Also, be aware when you book this place because it actually does false adverts for “free shuttle bus to the airport” arrives but, upon checkout it does indicate € 6 per person. At the time, it was fine because it was expensive everywhere else but, the false advertising is just so wrong. 
Once we got on the shuttle bus the driver was collecting tickets and my husband and I never go one. When we told the bus driver he started yelling at us in Italian and was rude and miserable. My husband got up and went to YHE front desk to get our ticket to which the lady told him “oh,no one gave you your ticket?” Like obviously not if we’re asking.
This place had a lot of promise when we booked but, it was not a good way to end our honeymoon and we were miserable the whole time. I have requested for all my money back because this hotel is not worth it. EVEN IF, you are going to the airport and it’s close by. Don’t let their cheap prices fool you because you get what you pay for.. if not less.

reviews.title: Bescheiden
reviews.text: Een prettig bezoek ervaren in een vrij groot hotel met een mooi zwembad die circa 1,70m diep was. Mijn zoontje van 11 jaar vond het geweldig! Wij hebben een city breakfast, van €5,- per persoon gegeten, wat inhoud lekkere croissants en zoetigheid onder het genot van een cappuccino , latte, espresso of een thee. Ook is er verse sinaasappelsap beschikbaar. Voor de wat zwaardere ontbijten zijn er ook andere mogelijkheden 😁. Wij hadden 2 kamers met kingsize bedden, prima geslapen, mede ook dankzij de extra kussens, zelf houd ik niet zo van een plat hotelkussen. De extra kussens zijn dan ook super. De kamers waren schoon, maar het tapijt zou en de meubels zijn war gedateerd. Misschien een idee om dit in de winterperiode van 2024 te renoveren. Receptie en personeel is behulpzaam en klantgericht. Taxi van airport naar hotel en andersom hebben wij 30 euro voor betaald per rit. Is inderdaad wat aan de hoge kant, maar de taxichauffeurs waren aardig en netjes.  Lopen van het vliegveld naar het hotel en andersom raad ik af, wegens de wegen. Verder lekker genoten!

reviews.title: 四つ星並み
reviews.text: 朝早くのフライトだったので前日にフロントでタクシーを予約しました。ホテルで予約したタクシーだったので安心して乗ったら空港まで20€請求されびっくりしました。イタリアでタクシーにぼったくられたのはこれで3回目でメーターが付いていても不正に操作されるので最初に値段交渉が基本ですね。ホテルでも何やらタクシーを呼んだおかねとかも請求されました。朝寝ぼけていて確認も忘れてしまい何かスッキリしませんでした。
reviews.positives: 翌日のフライトが早かったのでただ泊まっただけなので何とも言えませんが部屋は清潔で綺麗でした。到着は夕方でしたが少しプールも入れました。

reviews.response:

 Best Regards 
The Management

reviews.title: 공항환승 호텔
reviews.text: 인천공항으로 부터 제노아에 가는 길에 로마에서 1박해야함. 이 경우 이 호텔이 거리와 가격면에서 최선의 선택. 인천으로 부터 제노아로 갈경우 밀라노에서 내려 기차로 제노아로 갈 것을 권장함.
reviews.positives: 공항과의 거리, 가격, 조식

reviews.title: 좋아용
reviews.text: 공항과 가까운줄 알았는데 도보로는 50분이고 택시타고 7분정도? 되는것 같아요,, 하지만 공항근처 숙소들이 다 이정도 거리로 떨어져 있어요. 여기가 가까운곳 이더라구요. 후기 찾아보니까 택시기사님 잘못만나면 25유로까지 달라고 한다네요ㅜㅜ 저는 다행히 택시기사님 잘 만나서 7유로정도 나왔던것 같아요. 공항에서 택시를 탄건 아니고 도보로 걸어가려다 너무 어두워서 주차장쪽 지나서 탔습니다. 동양인은 리뉴얼 안된 더러운객실 제공한다는 후기를 봐서 걱정했는데 저는 엄청 깨끗한 객실 배정 받아서 너무 좋았습니다. 인포 서비스도 친절하세용. 공항으로 가는 셔틀버스도 있어서 너무 좋았습니다. 체크인할때 셔틀버스 예약하면 될것같아요. 6유로 지불 했습니당

reviews.title: 공항에서 가까운 호텔
reviews.text: 다음날아침에 떠나야해서 이곳에 묵었습니다 셔틀버스가 비싸긴했지만 잘있다가 갔습니다

reviews.title: 트래스퍼나 이른 출발 비행기일때
reviews.text:
공항에서 5키로 내외로 조용한 곳에 위치하고 시설도 가격대비 좋아서 쉬기 좋습니다.
공항에서 셔틀버스 운행하니 25번미니밴 주차장으로 가면 6유로에 공항셔틀 이용 가능합니다.
14유로에 로마시내까지 운행하는 셔틀도 있구요.
다만 저는 이른 출발 비행기라 아침 5시전에 체크아웃하고 샌딩서비스 이용했는데 20유로였습니다.
페이지에 나온 픽업.샌딩비용은 셔틀버스비용이며
셔틀버스 운행시간이 아닐때는 택시비20유로 생각하셔야 합니다.
시간 고려하셔서 선택하세요.
그래도 여긴 신식으로 지은 건물이라 방에 전기포트 냉장고 금고 있습니다.

reviews.title: 가격대비 괜찬습니다.
reviews.text:
방은 넓어서 좋았고 위생상태는 보통입니다.
민감하지 않으시다면 괜찮아요
침대가 좀 삐그덕 거리긴했는데 신경쓰이는 정도는 아니었습니다.
하루이틀 묵기에 가성비 갠차나요~

reviews.title: 공항근처
reviews.text:
23년8월6일 일요일 기준 22만원
무료주차장 크고 안전함 공항근처 3키로거리
도착해서 잠만자고 아침에 치비타로 떠나기좋음.
조식 무난함.

reviews.title: 로마 공항 근처 숙소
reviews.text: 공항에서 호텔버스 타는 곳 찾기가 쉽지 않았습니다. 호텔버스는 편도 1인당 6유로였고요. 호텔 건물은 오래 됐지만 청소 상태는 깨끗했어요. 직원들도 친절했고요.

reviews.title: 공항 근처 좋은 숙소입니당
reviews.text: 하지만 걸어가기에는 나쁘니 걸어가지는 마세요!

reviews.title: 가성비 좋은 호텔
reviews.text: 경유하면서 갈때 묵었다가 좋아서 올때도 묵었어요 7만원대에 숙박했는데 가성비 정말 좋아요 완전 깨끗하고 조식은 13유로 추가해서 먹었는데 기본적으로 나올거 다 나오는 뷔페식~~ 정말 좋았어요 다음에 로마가면 또 숙박하고싶어요 단 공항에선 엄청 가까운데 시내까지는 멀어서 경유로 딱 좋은!

reviews.title: 糟透了
reviews.text: 糟透了

reviews.title: Too old
reviews.text: Facilities are quite old. Quite pricy hotel in relation to the location and hotel hardwares.

reviews.title: 不推荐
reviews.text: 设施很久，卫生很一般。机场巴士很难找。

reviews.title: 还是住市区方便
reviews.text: 如果你还要去市区玩，没必要住在那里，第二天直接坐大巴去机场也方便，那地方打车的打不到，只能坐酒店的车去机场才能坐车去市区，很不方便，房间比较旧

reviews.title: 离机场不是很方便，还是不要住了
reviews.text: 往返机场都是要收钱的，设施比较老旧，没必要来住

reviews.title: 适合机场附近短暂停留
reviews.text: 离机场近，公交不可达，但可以在T3的三号门出口马路中间的路岛等酒店接驳巴士，6欧一个人。酒店房间挺大，但我觉得设施也就一般吧，被套没有封口，所以被褥很容易从被套中漏出来。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 酒店可安排机场接送机20欧，酒店环境还挺好

reviews.title: 性价比超高，能看江苏卫视
reviews.text: 此行性价比最高的酒店，住的比较舒服，酒店服务很好，关键是前台态度非常好而且英语很过关。离机场不远，有酒店巴士送机，但是需要每人6欧元费用。

reviews.title: فندق روما
reviews.text: الفندق بعيد و يحتاج الى سيارة لتنقل . المواقف داخل الفندق مجانية . العفش قديم و ريحة الحمام مقززه . المرافق بدائية جداً الموقع قريب جداً من المطار

reviews.title: فندق جميل للباحثين سكن قريب من مطار فيبوناتشي روما
reviews.text: الفندق جميل يتوفر به مواقف للسيارات ، التعامل مع طاقم الفندق جيد ، السعر فوق المتوسط

reviews.title: מלון ללא חלונות
reviews.text: לא ניתן לאוורר את החדרים ואין שליטה על המזגן. צוות לא ידידותי
reviews.response:
Dear Moshe, 
we thank you very much for choosing to stay in our hotel.We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

reviews.text: There is a shuttle to the airport and to rome center , on a bus terminal 50 meter from rhe hotel, it seems that the front desk dosent know about it, they were trying to push the hotel shuttle service only to the airport..

reviews.title: Ok hyvä yhden yön stoppi
reviews.text:
Tämä oli hyvä valinta viimeiseksi yöksi ennen aamulentoa, koska meillä oli vuokra-auto. Iso ilmainen parkkitila. 
Tulimme noin kymmeneltä ja baarissa sai vielä pitsaa, ei muuta. Henkilökunta ja palvelu oli kokonaisuudessaan melko hidasta. 
Varauskin oli jotenkin väärä, mutta korjattiin veloituksetta oikeaksi. Ihan kattavan hyvä aamupala. Hinta-laatusuhde siis ihan hyvä!

reviews.text:
На одну ночь
Кавролин,

reviews.title: Нормально.
reviews.text: Старенький отель, в номерах чисто, завтрак удовлетворительный.  Своих денег не стоит.

reviews.title: Ok i forhold til parkering og hvile
reviews.text:
Hotellet er ikke 4 stjerner slik man kunne forventet, men til vårt formål som var parkering og hvile var hotellet het ok. Ikke glass på rommet, rommet ble heller ikke ryddet mellom  de 2 nettet oppholdet varte. Betjeningen var helt ok, men ikke spesielt høflige. 
Det var en hyggelig ung mann på kveldsvakt, flere sånne som han hadde hjulpet på .
Likevel,  om parkering og hvile er det viktigste så kan jeg bo her igjen.

reviews.title: Greit hotell for kort opphold
reviews.text: Helt greit hotell for kort opphold. Maten var litt skuffende og hadde forventet litt mer fra en italiensk restaurant. Kort avstand til flyplassen. Shuttle til hotell koster 6 euro. Fint utebasseng.
